title: Prisoner swap goes ahead as Kyiv mourns 24 killed in Russian strike on flats

title: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
snippet: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.

title: Harry and Meghan to produce Afghan war film for Netflix
snippet: The couple's production company will make a film based on a true story of British troops under siege.

snippet: Middlesbrough demand Southampton's expulsion from the Championship play-offs over spying allegations.

title: Search for new James Bond officially kicks off as auditions begin

title: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues
snippet: Analysts say the moves have been fuelled by concerns a Burnham-led government would increase government borrowing.

title: Judge declares another mistrial in Harvey Weinstein New York rape case
snippet: It marks the third time a New York jury has considered the case against the 74-year-old disgraced film mogul.

title: UK's biggest ever environmental pollution claim reaches High Court

title: US federal watchdog sues Chick-fil-A operator for religious discrimination
snippet: A franchisee of the fast-food restaurant is accused of refusing an employee time off to observe the Sabbath, which is on Saturday in her Christian church.

title: 'We're living in a shed because of river pollution'
